ListProject.name: Keyword for filtering log group names
ListProject.description: Keyword for filtering log group descriptions
ListProject.orderBy: Sort field, defaults to creation time; supported values: createdAt (creation time), updatedAt (last modified time), name (name)
ListProject.order: Sort order; desc for descending, asc for ascending, defaults to desc
ListProject.pageSize: Number of records per page, defaults to 10
